description.value:
The twisted, reviled outcasts of the Imperium. Mutants are those whose bodies have been warped by the influence of the Warp, radiation, or chemical exposure. They are driven to the lowest depths of hive cities, where they eke out desperate existences in the toxic sumps and forgotten tunnels.

Tactics: Mutants attack in mobs of 6-20, swarming enemies with crude weapons and sheer numbers. They rely on their physical resilience and ferocity. Some possess dangerous mutations that make them far more lethal than their stats suggest. Morale is poor unless driven by a charismatic leader or Chaos influence.
